fields.name: is_superuser
fields.help_text: Designates that this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them.

fields.name: is_staff
fields.help_text: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.

fields.name: is_active
fields.help_text: Designates whether this user should be treated as active. Unselect this instead of deleting accounts.

fields.name: groups
fields.help_text: The groups this user belongs to. A user will get all permissions granted to each of their groups.

fields.name: transcript_approved_by_teacher
fields.help_text: Teacher must approve transcript before AI features (notes, flashcards, quizzes) can use it

fields.name: game_data
fields.help_text: Stores all game content (questions, config, etc.)

fields.name: source_lecture
fields.help_text: If AI-generated, the lecture it was based on

fields.name: expected_answer_keywords
fields.help_text: Keywords AI should look for when grading

fields.name: weight_percentage
fields.help_text: Percentage weight (all criteria must sum to 100)

fields.name: submission_method
fields.help_text: For online assignments: how student submitted (text vs PDF)

fields.name: uploaded_file
fields.help_text: PDF file for both online-PDF and offline submissions

fields.name: ai_grading_data
fields.help_text: Detailed AI analysis and scoring breakdown

fields.name: teacher_modified_ai_score
fields.help_text: True if teacher changed AI suggestion

fields.name: amount
fields.help_text: Positive for earned, negative for spent

fields.name: requirement_description
fields.help_text: What student needs to do to earn this

fields.name: rank_change
fields.help_text: Positive = moved up, negative = moved down

fields.name: ai_transcript_snippet
fields.help_text: Transcript excerpt that triggered AI detection

fields.name: lecture_timestamp
fields.help_text: Timestamp in lecture (seconds) where incident occurred

fields.name: action_url
fields.help_text: URL to navigate to when clicked

fields.name: sections
fields.help_text: Sections to include: grades, attendance, behavior, etc.

fields.name: layout_config
fields.help_text: Layout settings: colors, fonts, logo, etc.

fields.name: recipients
fields.help_text: List of email addresses to send report to
